calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Small Claims Appeal Hearing, having been assigned for Trial De Novo from Department 206.
Dept. 611, Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty.

Plaintiff/Respondent Javier Joseph Espinoza was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Fulvio A. Picerno, Esq. appeared with defendant/appellant, Roberta Marlow, who was placed under oath and testified.
Judgment was entered for plaintiff/respondent on January 7, 2011.
Notice of Time & Place of Hearing on Appeal was filed on February 14, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff/Appellant Javier Joseph Espinoza, and against the Defendant/Respondent Roberta Marlow as follows:

Principal - $1,585.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $87.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,672.50.

Judgment was signed by the Court.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Set For Trial On Mar-16-11 At 09:40 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Continued To Mar-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Judgment Entered
